title: EXOTIC-CCR A001: Poisson/Weyl lifts of a Jacobian counterexample seed with dual-field incompleteness and ESS obstruction
description:
EXOTIC-CCR v0.2.2 (A001 arXiv package) — Author: Daniel Eric Fredriksen (Quantyra Inc).

Certified results:

  • Seed: det DF = −2; three-point collision (dual CAS + Lean)
  • Poisson cotangent lift Φ and polynomial Weyl endomorphism ψ; div B = 0
  • X_1 incomplete on R³ (explicit blow-up curve)
  • P_1^sym = −i X_1 not ESS on C_c^∞(R³)
  • Leb_3({T_+ < ∞}) > 0; deficiency indices (n_+, n_-) = (0, ∞)

Paper: docs/notes/A001-arxiv-draft.md

Non-claims: No unitary gate, channel, CP map, or computational advantage. No unique physical momenta without extension choices. No ESS claim for all three dual momenta.

Apache-2.0. https://github.com/Quantyra/jacobian-weyl-quantum-phase-space
